metadata.website_type: automotive tyres and car services website

tasks.name: Add four highest-rated 205/55 R16 winter tyres under $120 each to the cart
tasks.description: Find winter tyres in size 205/55 R16, filter to prices under $120 per tyre and ratings of 4+ stars, sort by rating, and add the highest-rated option as a quantity of 4 to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation menu item labeled "Tyres" or "Shop Tyres".
In the tyre size selector, set the Width field to "205", the Profile field to "55", and the Rim Diameter field to "16".
In the Season or Type filter section, select the "Winter" option.
Locate the Price filter and set the maximum price per tyre to "$120".
In the Ratings filter, select the option to show only products with "4 stars & up".
Open the Sort dropdown and choose "Customer Rating: High to Low".
From the sorted results list, click on the first tyre product card to open its product details page.
On the product page, set the quantity field to "4" tyres.
Click the "Add to Cart" or "Add 4 Tyres to Cart" button.

tasks.name: Book a wheel alignment on the 15th of next month between 10:00–12:00 at the nearest branch to ZIP 10001
tasks.description: Schedule a wheel alignment service by finding the nearest branch to ZIP code 10001, selecting the date as the 15th day of next month, and choosing a time slot between 10:00–12:00.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the main navigation item labeled "Services".
On the services list page, click the card or link titled "Wheel Alignment".
On the wheel alignment page, locate the location or ZIP field, enter "10001", and click the "Find Branches" or "Search" button.
From the list of nearby branches, click the "Book Now" button on the first branch in the list.
In the date picker, navigate to the next calendar month and click on the date labeled "15".
In the list of available time slots for that date, select a slot labeled between "10:00" and "12:00" (for example, "10:00–12:00").
In the booking form, enter the name "Alex Smith", phone number "5551234567", and email address "alex@example.com" into the appropriate fields.
In the vehicle details section, select "Ford" as the make, "Focus" as the model, and "2017" as the year from the dropdowns.
Tick the checkbox to accept the terms and conditions, then click the "Confirm Booking" or "Continue" button.

tasks.name: Buy two mid-range all-season 225/45 R17 tyres with free fitting under $150 each
tasks.description: Find all-season tyres in size 225/45 R17 from mid-range brands that include free fitting, limit the price to $150 or less per tyre, and add a quantity of 2 to the cart with fitting selected.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Tyres" or "Buy Tyres" section in the main navigation.
In the tyre size search area, set Width to "225", Profile to "45", and Rim to "17".
In the Season filter, select the "All-Season" option.
Open the Brand filter and choose the category or checkbox labeled "Mid-range brands" (or similar mid-range category).
In the Benefits or Extras filter, select the checkbox labeled "Free fitting" or "Free installation".
Use the Price filter to set the maximum price per tyre to "$150".
From the Sort dropdown, select "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first tyre product shown in the sorted results list to open its details page.
On the product page, set the quantity to "2" tyres and click the button labeled "Add with Fitting", "Book Fitting", or equivalent to add them to the cart with fitting selected.

tasks.name: Book a full service and inspection for a 2018 Toyota Corolla within the next 14 days at the closest center to ZIP 94105
tasks.description: Set up a full service + inspection package for a 2018 Toyota Corolla (petrol) by selecting the nearest center to ZIP 94105 and choosing the earliest available 09:00–11:00 slot within the next 14 days.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the navigation item labeled "Service Packages" or similar.
On the service packages page, click the option titled "Full Service & Inspection" or "Full Service + Safety Check".
On the vehicle details form, select "Toyota" as the make, "Corolla" as the model, "2018" as the year, and "Petrol" as the fuel type using the dropdown controls.
In the location or ZIP code field, enter "94105" and click the "Find Centers" or "Search" button.
From the list of service centers returned, select the first center (closest) by clicking its "Select" or "Book Here" button.
In the date picker, navigate through the calendar to find the earliest date within the next 14 days that offers a morning slot and select that date.
From the available time slots shown for that date, choose a slot labeled "09:00–11:00" or the earliest time window starting at 09:00.
On the booking form, enter the name "Jamie Lee", phone number "5559876543", and email address "jamie@example.com" into the corresponding fields.
Click the "Continue to Review", "Proceed", or "Confirm Appointment" button to finalize the booking details.

tasks.name: Add two cheapest performance summer 195/50 R15 tyres with speed rating W+ and rating 4.5+ to the cart
tasks.description: Search for performance summer tyres in size 195/50 R15 with a speed rating of W or higher and a customer rating of at least 4.5 stars, sort by price, and add a pair of the cheapest option to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Tyres" or "Browse Tyres" link in the main navigation bar.
In the tyre size form, set Width to "195", Profile to "50", and Rim to "15".
In the Season filter section, select the "Summer" option.
In the Performance or Usage filter, select the option labeled "Performance" or "Sport".
Open the Speed Rating filter and select "W" and any higher options (for example, "Y" or "ZR"), ensuring that W and above are included.
Open the Customer Rating filter and choose the option for "4.5 stars & up".
Use the Sort dropdown to select "Price: Low to High".
Click on the first tyre listed in the results (the cheapest that meets the filters) to open its product details page.
On the product page, set the quantity to "2" tyres and click the "Add to Cart" button.

tasks.name: Book a mobile oil change for ZIP 30301 next Friday morning and apply promo code SAVE20
tasks.description: Schedule a mobile oil change service at a home address in ZIP code 30301 for next Friday in a time slot starting before 11:00, and apply the promo code SAVE20 before confirming the appointment.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the "Services" option in the main navigation.
On the services page, click the card or link labeled "Oil Change".
On the oil change service page, select the option or toggle for "Mobile service" or "At home/work".
In the location or ZIP field, enter "30301" and click the "Check Availability" or "Find Slots" button.
In the date selector, navigate to the calendar week containing next Friday and click on the date corresponding to that Friday.
In the list of available time slots for next Friday, select a slot that starts before 11:00 (for example, "09:00–11:00").
In the booking form, enter name "Taylor Morgan", street address "123 Main Street", city "Atlanta", and phone number "5552223344" into the appropriate fields.
In the promo or voucher code field, type "SAVE20" and click the "Apply" button.
Click the "Continue" or "Confirm Appointment" button to finalize the mobile oil change booking.

tasks.name: Compare 225/40 R18 summer tyres and add the option with noise ≤70 dB, fuel rating A/B, and price under $140 (4 tyres)
tasks.description: Search for 225/40 R18 summer tyres, compare multiple options, and from the comparison choose a tyre that has a noise level of 70 dB or lower, a fuel efficiency rating of A or B, and a price under $140, then add 4 of that tyre to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Tyres" or "Shop Tyres" item in the main navigation.
Use the search bar or size selector to search for "225/40 R18 summer" and execute the search (for example, by pressing Enter or clicking the search icon).
On the search results page, apply a filter for Season and select "Summer" if it is not already active.
Apply a Price filter setting the maximum price per tyre to "$140".
In the results list, tick the comparison checkboxes for the first three tyre products.
Click the "Compare" or "Compare Selected" button to open the comparison table for those tyres.
On the comparison page, identify the tyre that has a listed noise level of "70 dB" or lower and a fuel efficiency rating of either "A" or "B", and click its product name or "View Details" link.
On the selected tyre's product page, set the quantity field to "4" tyres.
Click the "Add to Cart" button to add all 4 tyres to the cart.

tasks.name: Book a Saturday afternoon fitting appointment for the tyres in your cart near ZIP 60601
tasks.description: Starting from the cart with tyres already added, schedule a fitting appointment at a branch near ZIP code 60601 that is open on Saturdays, selecting a Saturday time slot between 13:00–15:00.
steps: Click the cart icon or "Cart" link in the website header to open the shopping cart page.
On the cart page, locate the tyre items and click the button labeled "Book Fitting", "Arrange Fitting", or similar.
In the fitting location section, enter ZIP code "60601" and click the "Find Locations" or "Search" button.
Use the available filters to select or enable the option labeled "Open on Saturday" or "Saturday appointments".
From the filtered list of locations, click the "Select" or "Choose" button for the second branch shown in the list.
In the date picker, navigate to the next available Saturday and click on that date.
From the list of time slots for that Saturday, select a slot labeled between "13:00" and "15:00" (for example, "13:00–15:00").
On the appointment details page, enter or confirm your name and phone number in the corresponding contact fields.
Scroll down if necessary and click the "Confirm Fitting Appointment" button.
Proceed by clicking any "Continue" or "Review Order" button that appears after confirming the fitting appointment.

entities.name: TyreProduct
entities.description: Tyre products available for browsing, comparison, and purchase.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the tyre

fields.name: brand_id
fields.description: Reference to Brand

fields.name: width
fields.description: Tyre width, e.g., 205

fields.name: profile
fields.description: Aspect ratio, e.g., 55

fields.name: rim_diameter
fields.description: Rim size in inches, e.g., 16

fields.name: size_label
fields.description: Human-readable size, e.g., '205/55 R16'

fields.name: season
fields.description: Season/type filter

fields.name: performance_category
fields.description: Usage/performance category

fields.name: speed_rating
fields.description: Speed rating code (stored as lowercase but represents Q, R, S, T, H, V, W, Y, ZR)

fields.name: price_per_tyre
fields.description: Price per tyre in currency units

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency for pricing

fields.name: brand_tier
fields.description: Brand tier used for filters like 'Mid-range brands'

fields.name: has_free_fitting
fields.description: True if this tyre includes free fitting/installation

fields.name: customer_rating
fields.description: Average customer rating, 0–5 scale

fields.name: customer_rating_count
fields.description: Number of customer reviews

fields.name: noise_db
fields.description: External noise level in dB, used for filters like ≤70 dB

fields.name: fuel_efficiency_rating
fields.description: Fuel efficiency rating

fields.name: wet_grip_rating
fields.description: Wet grip rating if shown in comparison

fields.name: image_url
fields.description: URL to primary product image

fields.name: description
fields.description: Long description and key features

fields.name: is_available
fields.description: Indicates whether the tyre can be purchased

entities.name: Brand
entities.description: Tyre brand metadata and tier for filters like budget/mid-range/premium.

fields.name: tier
fields.description: Brand tier classification

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether the brand is currently offered

entities.name: Cart
entities.description: Shopping cart (single active cart for the agent).

fields.name: cart_item_ids
fields.description: Array of CartItem IDs contained in this cart

fields.name: total_items
fields.description: Total quantity of tyres across all items

fields.name: subtotal
fields.description: Sum of line subtotals (tyres only, excluding services)

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency of cart totals

fields.name: has_fitting_appointments
fields.description: True if any cart item has an associated fitting appointment

fields.name: has_service_bookings
fields.description: True if any standalone services have been booked alongside this cart

entities.name: CartItem
entities.description: Line item within the shopping cart representing a specific tyre product and quantity.

fields.name: cart_id
fields.description: Reference to Cart containing this item

fields.name: tyre_product_id
fields.description: Reference to TyreProduct

fields.name: quantity
fields.description: Number of tyres for this product

fields.name: price_per_tyre
fields.description: Snapshot of price per tyre at the time of adding to cart

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency for this line item

fields.name: include_fitting
fields.description: True if tyres are being purchased with fitting selected

fields.name: fitting_status
fields.description: Whether fitting is needed and if it has been arranged

fields.name: fitting_appointment_id
fields.description: Reference to FittingAppointment when booked

entities.name: Branch
entities.description: Physical branches/centers for in-center services and tyre fitting.

fields.name: type
fields.description: Type of branch/location

fields.name: open_on_saturday
fields.description: Used for filters like 'Open on Saturday'

fields.name: has_wheel_alignment
fields.description: Branch offers wheel alignment service

fields.name: has_oil_change
fields.description: Branch offers oil change service

fields.name: has_full_service
fields.description: Branch offers full service & inspection package

fields.name: has_tyre_fitting
fields.description: Branch offers tyre fitting

fields.name: supports_mobile_service_area
fields.description: Branch supports mobile services in surrounding ZIPs

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether branch is available for bookings

entities.name: ServiceCategory
entities.description: Categories for grouping services, including service packages.

fields.name: code
fields.description: URL-facing category code, must include 'service_packages' for header link

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether this category is shown on the Services overview

entities.name: Service
entities.description: Individual services or service packages like wheel alignment, oil change, full service & inspection.

fields.name: code
fields.description: Service code used in URLs (serviceId=...)

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the service

fields.name: description
fields.description: Details of what the service includes

fields.name: category_id
fields.description: Reference to ServiceCategory (e.g., service_packages for full service)

fields.name: base_price
fields.description: Base service price before discounts

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Currency for pricing

fields.name: duration_minutes
fields.description: Estimated duration used for slot generation

fields.name: supports_in_center
fields.description: True if service can be performed at a branch

fields.name: supports_mobile
fields.description: True if service can be done as a mobile service (at home/work)

fields.name: is_package
fields.description: True for service bundles like 'Full Service & Inspection'

fields.name: requires_vehicle_details
fields.description: Whether booking requires make/model/year/fuel

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether the service is currently offered

entities.name: VehicleProfile
entities.description: Stored vehicle details used when booking services (make, model, year, fuel type).

fields.name: nickname
fields.description: Optional label for the vehicle

fields.name: make
fields.description: e.g., Ford, Toyota

fields.name: model
fields.description: e.g., Focus, Corolla

fields.name: fuel_type
fields.description: Fuel type for services where it matters

entities.name: ServiceBooking
entities.description: Bookings for services such as wheel alignment, full service, and mobile/in-center oil changes.

fields.name: service_id
fields.description: Reference to Service being booked

fields.name: service_code
fields.description: Snapshot of Service.code for easier logic

fields.name: branch_id
fields.description: Reference to Branch for in-center bookings (null for purely mobile context if not tied to a branch)

fields.name: mode
fields.description: Service mode (in-center vs mobile/at home)

fields.name: zip_code
fields.description: ZIP used for searching nearest branches or coverage (e.g., 10001, 94105, 30301)

fields.name: time_slot_id
fields.description: Reference to TimeSlot representing the chosen slot

fields.name: appointment_start
fields.description: Start datetime of the appointment

fields.name: appointment_end
fields.description: End datetime of the appointment

fields.name: timeslot_label
fields.description: Human-readable slot label, e.g., '09:00–11:00', '10:00–12:00'

fields.name: vehicle_profile_id
fields.description: Optional reference to a saved VehicleProfile

fields.name: vehicle_make
fields.description: Snapshot of vehicle make used in booking (e.g., Ford, Toyota)

fields.name: vehicle_model
fields.description: Snapshot of vehicle model used in booking (e.g., Focus, Corolla)

fields.name: vehicle_year
fields.description: Snapshot of vehicle year used in booking

fields.name: fuel_type
fields.description: Fuel type selected for the booking (e.g., petrol for 2018 Corolla)

fields.name: mobile_address_line1
fields.description: Street address for mobile services, e.g., '123 Main Street'

fields.name: mobile_city
fields.description: City for mobile service (e.g., Atlanta)

fields.name: mobile_zip_code
fields.description: ZIP at which mobile service will be performed

fields.name: promo_code
fields.description: Applied promo code string, e.g., 'SAVE20'

fields.name: promo_discount_amount
fields.description: Calculated discount amount applied from promo code

fields.name: terms_accepted
fields.description: True if user ticked terms & conditions checkbox

fields.name: status
fields.description: Lifecycle state of the booking

entities.name: FittingAppointment
entities.description: In-center fitting appointments for tyres already in the cart.

fields.name: branch_id
fields.description: Reference to Branch where fitting will take place

fields.name: time_slot_id
fields.description: Reference to TimeSlot chosen for fitting

fields.name: appointment_start
fields.description: Start datetime of the fitting appointment

fields.name: appointment_end
fields.description: End datetime of the fitting appointment

fields.name: timeslot_label
fields.description: Displayed time window, e.g., '13:00–15:00'

fields.name: search_zip_code
fields.description: ZIP used to search for fitting locations, e.g., '60601'

fields.name: cart_item_ids
fields.description: Array of CartItem IDs whose tyres will be fitted in this appointment

fields.name: status
fields.description: Fitting appointment status

entities.name: PromoCode
entities.description: Promotion and voucher codes that can be applied to services or tyre purchases.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary identifier; can match the code string (e.g., 'SAVE20')

fields.name: code
fields.description: Code entered by the user, e.g., 'SAVE20'

fields.name: discount_type
fields.description: How the discount is applied

fields.name: discount_value
fields.description: Percentage (e.g., 20 for 20%) or fixed amount depending on discount_type

fields.name: applicable_scope
fields.description: Scope where this promo can be used

fields.name: applicable_service_ids
fields.description: List of Service IDs to which the promo applies (if restricted)

fields.name: is_active
fields.description: Whether the promo code can currently be applied

entities.name: TimeSlot
entities.description: Bookable time slots for services and tyre fitting, shown in date pickers.

fields.name: branch_id
fields.description: Branch offering this slot (null for purely mobile slots if not associated with a branch)

fields.name: service_id
fields.description: Service for which this slot is valid (null if generic fitting-only slot)

fields.name: slot_date
fields.description: Calendar date for the slot (date component used)

fields.name: start_time
fields.description: Start time in HH:MM, e.g., '09:00'

fields.name: end_time
fields.description: End time in HH:MM, e.g., '11:00'

fields.name: label
fields.description: Display label, e.g., '09:00–11:00'

fields.name: slot_type
fields.description: Whether slot is for general services or fitting bookings

fields.name: is_available
fields.description: Whether the slot is currently free for booking

entities.name: TyreComparisonSet
entities.description: Temporary sets of tyres selected by the user for side-by-side comparison.

fields.name: tyre_product_ids
fields.description: Array of TyreProduct IDs included in the comparison table

fields.name: name
fields.description: Optional label for this comparison set
